ModMetaData.name: Ghoul Attack Spin 食尸鬼攻击旋转特效
ModMetaData.author: RunningBugs
ModMetaData.description:
Adds a pure visual 360-degree spin to ghouls when their normal melee attack animation plays. The spin has no gameplay effect and automatically ends with the short melee jitter animation.
为食尸鬼普通近战攻击动画增加纯视觉 360 度旋转效果。旋转不改变任何战斗/寻路/命中逻辑，并会在短暂攻击动画结束后自动恢复正常。
